allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./src/modules/auth/auth.service'\); require\('./src/modules/auth/auth.controller'\); require\('./src/modules/auth/auth.validation'\); require\('./src/modules/auth/auth.route'\); require\('./src/modules/order/order.service'\); require\('./src/modules/order/order.controller'\); require\('./src/modules/order/order.validation'\); require\('./src/modules/order/order.route'\); require\('./src/modules/admin/admin.service'\); require\('./src/modules/admin/admin.controller'\); require\('./src/modules/admin/admin.validation'\); require\('./src/modules/admin/admin.route'\); require\('./src/services/email.service'\); require\('./src/models'\); console.log\('OK — all modules load cleanly'\);")
